# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Response;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function show(Request $request)
    {
        $url = (string) $request->input('url', '');

        if ($url === '') {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Missing url'], 422);
        }

        $result = $this->fetchUrl($url);

        if (!$result['ok']) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Failed to fetch url',
                'details' => $result['error'],
            ], 422);
        }

        $preview = $this->buildPreview($result['body'], $url);

        return response()->json([
            'url' => $url,
            'final_url' => $result['effective_url'] ?? $url,
            'status' => $result['status'] ?? null,
            'content_type' => $result['content_type'] ?? null,
            'preview' => $preview,
        ]);
    }

    protected function fetchUrl(string $url): array
    {
        $ch = curl_init();
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 5,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 10,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0 (+Laravel)',
            CURLOPT_HEADER => true,
            CURLOPT_NOBODY => false,
            CURLOPT_HTTPGET => true,
            CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        ]);

        $raw = curl_exec($ch);

        if ($raw === false) {
            $err = curl_error($ch);
            curl_close($ch);
            return ['ok' => false, 'error' => $err];
        }

        $headerSize = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);
        $headersRaw = substr($raw, 0, $headerSize);
        $body = substr($raw, $headerSize);

        $status = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $contentType = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_CONTENT_TYPE);
        $effectiveUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);

        curl_close($ch);

        if ($status < 200 || $status >= 400) {
            return [
                'ok' => false,
                'error' => 'HTTP ' . $status,
                'status' => $status,
                'content_type' => $contentType,
                'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
                'headers' => $headersRaw,
            ];
        }

        return [
            'ok' => true,
            'status' => $status,
            'content_type' => $contentType,
            'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
            'headers' => $headersRaw,
            'body' => $body,
        ];
    }

    protected function buildPreview(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $title = null;
        $description = null;
        $image = null;
        $siteName = null;

        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $dom = new \DOMDocument();
        $dom->loadHTML($html, LIBXML_NOWARNING | LIBXML_NOERROR);

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($dom);

        $meta = function (string $query) use ($xpath): ?string {
            $node = $xpath->query($query)->item(0);
            if (!$node) return null;
            return trim((string) $node->getAttribute('content'));
        };

        $titleNode = $xpath->query('//title')->item(0);
        if ($titleNode) {
            $title = trim($titleNode->textContent);
        }

        $ogTitle = $meta("//meta[@property='og:title']");
        $ogDesc = $meta("//meta[@property='og:description']");
        $ogImage = $meta("//meta[@property='og:image']");
        $ogSite = $meta("//meta[@property='og:site_name']");

        $twTitle = $meta("//meta[@name='twitter:title']");
        $twDesc = $meta("//meta[@name='twitter:description']");
        $twImage = $meta("//meta[@name='twitter:image']");

        $stdDesc = $meta("//meta[@name='description']");

        $title = $ogTitle ?: $twTitle ?: $title;
        $description = $ogDesc ?: $twDesc ?: $stdDesc;
        $image = $ogImage ?: $twImage;
        $siteName = $ogSite;

        if ($image) {
            $image = $this->absolutizeUrl($image, $url);
        }

        return [
            'title' => $title ?: null,
            'description' => $description ?: null,
            'image' => $image ?: null,
            'site_name' => $siteName ?: null,
        ];
    }

    protected function absolutizeUrl(string $maybeRelative, string $baseUrl): string
    {
        $maybeRelative = trim($maybeRelative);
        if ($maybeRelative === '') return $maybeRelative;

        if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $maybeRelative)) {
            return $maybeRelative;
        }

        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '//')) {
            $base = parse_url($baseUrl);
            $scheme = $base['scheme'] ?? 'https';
            return $scheme . ':' . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $base = parse_url($baseUrl);
        $scheme = $base['scheme'] ?? 'https';
        $host = $base['host'] ?? '';
        $port = isset($base['port']) ? ':' . $base['port'] : '';
        $path = $base['path'] ?? '/';

        $origin = $scheme . '://' . $host . $port;

        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '/')) {
            return $origin . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $dir = preg_replace('#/[^/]*$#', '/', $path);
        return $origin . $dir . $maybeRelative;
    }
}
